sEn: Drifting Models evolve the pushforward distribution during training and achieve one-step inference, setting new state-of-the-art FID scores on ImageNet.
sZh: 漂移模型在训练过程中演化前推分布，实现单步推理，在 ImageNet 上取得了新的最优 FID 分数。
absEn: Generative modeling can be formulated as learning a mapping f such that its pushforward distribution matches the data distribution. The pushforward behavior can be carried out iteratively at inference time, for example in diffusion and flow-based models. In this paper, we propose a new paradigm called Drifting Models, which evolve the pushforward distribution during training and naturally admit one-step inference. We introduce a drifting field that governs the sample movement and achieves equilibrium when the distributions match. This leads to a training objective that allows the neural network optimizer to evolve the distribution. In experiments, our one-step generator achieves state-of-the-art results on ImageNet at 256 x 256 resolution, with an FID of 1.54 in latent space and 1.61 in pixel space. We hope that our work opens up new opportunities for high-quality one-step generation.
absZh: 生成建模可以表述为学习一个映射 f，使其前推分布与数据分布匹配。在推理时，前推行为可以迭代进行，例如在扩散和基于流的模型中。本文提出了一种称为漂移模型的新范式，它在训练过程中演化前推分布，并自然地允许单步推理。我们引入了一个漂移场，它控制样本移动，并在分布匹配时达到平衡。这导致了一个训练目标，允许神经网络优化器演化分布。在实验中，我们的单步生成器在 256×256 分辨率的 ImageNet 上取得了最先进的结果，潜在空间 FID 为 1.54，像素空间 FID 为 1.61。我们希望我们的工作为高质量单步生成开辟新的机会。

contrib.en: Proposes Drifting Models, a new generative paradigm that evolves pushforward distribution during training, enabling one-step inference.
contrib.zh: 提出漂移模型，一种新的生成范式，在训练期间演化前推分布，实现单步推理。

contrib.en: Introduces a drifting field that governs sample movement and achieves equilibrium when distributions match.
contrib.zh: 引入漂移场，控制样本移动，并在分布匹配时达到平衡。

contrib.en: Achieves state-of-the-art one-step FID of 1.54 on ImageNet 256x256 in latent space and 1.61 in pixel space.
contrib.zh: 在 ImageNet 256x256 上，潜在空间 FID 达 1.54，像素空间 FID 达 1.61，均为单步生成最优。

contrib.en: Provides a training objective minimizing drift norm, compatible with standard optimizers like SGD.
contrib.zh: 提供最小化漂移范数的训练目标，兼容 SGD 等标准优化器。

contrib.en: Extends to feature space and multi-scale losses, improving high-dimensional data generation.
contrib.zh: 扩展到特征空间和多尺度损失，提升高维数据生成质量。

contrib.en: Demonstrates effectiveness on robotics control, matching 100-step diffusion policy with one step.
contrib.zh: 在机器人控制任务中，单步漂移模型匹配 100 步扩散策略的性能。

limits.en: The converse implication (zero drift implies distribution match) is not theoretically guaranteed.
limits.zh: 零漂移意味着分布匹配的逆命题在理论上不保证成立。

limits.en: Requires a pre-trained feature encoder; method fails on ImageNet without one.
limits.zh: 需要预训练特征编码器；无编码器时在 ImageNet 上失效。

limits.en: Design choices (drifting field, kernel, architecture) may be suboptimal and need further exploration.
limits.zh: 漂移场、核函数、架构等设计选择可能非最优，需进一步探索。

limits.en: Training relies on batch sampling of positives and negatives; performance sensitive to batch size.
limits.zh: 训练依赖正负样本批次采样，性能对批次大小敏感。

limits.en: Limited theoretical analysis on conditions for convergence to data distribution.
limits.zh: 对收敛到数据分布的条件缺乏充分理论分析。

items.en: Generative modeling can be formulated as learning a mapping ff such that its pushforward distribution matches the data distribution. The pushforward behavior can be carried out iteratively at inference time, e.g., in diffusion/flow-based models. In this paper, we propose a new paradigm called Drifting Models, which evolve the pushforward distribution during training and naturally admit one-step inference. We introduce a drifting field that governs the sample movement and achieves equilibrium when the distributions match. This leads to a training objective that allows the neural network optimizer to evolve the distribution. In experiments, our one-step generator achieves state-of-the-art results on ImageNet 256×\times256, with FID 1.54 in latent space and 1.61 in pixel space. We hope that our work opens up new opportunities for high-quality one-step generation.
items.zh: 生成建模可以表述为学习一个映射 f，使得其推前分布与数据分布匹配。推前行为可以在推理时迭代执行，例如在基于扩散/流的模型中。本文提出一种名为漂移模型的新范式，它在训练过程中演化推前分布，并自然地支持单步推理。我们引入一个漂移场来指导样本移动，并在分布匹配时达到平衡。这导致了一个训练目标，允许神经网络优化器演化分布。实验中，我们的单步生成器在 ImageNet 256×256 上取得了最先进的结果，潜空间 FID 为 1.54，像素空间 FID 为 1.61。我们希望我们的工作为高质量单步生成开辟新的机遇。

items.en: * Project page: lambertae.github.io/projects/drifting
items.zh: * 项目页面：lambertae.github.io/projects/drifting

items.en: Generative models are commonly regarded as more challenging than discriminative models. While discriminative modeling typically focuses on mapping individual samples to their corresponding labels, generative modeling concerns mapping from one distribution to another. This can be expressed as learning a mapping ff such that the pushforward of a prior distribution ppriorp_{\text{prior}} matches the data distribution, namely, f#​pprior≈pdataf_{\#}p_{\text{prior}}\approx p_{\text{data}}. Conceptually, generative modeling learns a functional (here, f#f_{\#}) that maps from one function (here, a distribution) to another.
items.zh: 生成模型通常被认为比判别模型更具挑战性。判别建模通常关注将单个样本映射到其对应标签，而生成建模关注从一个分布映射到另一个分布。这可以表述为学习一个映射 f，使得先验分布 p_prior 的推前与数据分布匹配，即 f_# p_prior ≈ p_data。从概念上讲，生成建模学习一个泛函（此处为 f_#），它将一个函数（此处为分布）映射到另一个函数。

items.en: The “pushforward” behavior can be realized iteratively at inference time, e.g., in prevailing paradigms such as Diffusion (Sohl-Dickstein et al., 2015) and Flow Matching (Lipman et al., 2022). When generating, these models map noisier samples to slightly cleaner ones, progressively evolving the sample distribution toward the data distribution. This modeling philosophy can be viewed as decomposing a complex pushforward map (i.e., f#f_{\#}) into a chain of more feasible transformations, applied at inference time.
items.zh: “推前”行为可以在推理时迭代实现，例如在主流范式如扩散（Sohl-Dickstein 等，2015）和流匹配（Lipman 等，2022）中。生成时，这些模型将噪声较大的样本映射到稍干净的样本，逐步将样本分布演化为数据分布。这种建模哲学可以看作是将复杂的推前映射（即 f_#）分解为一系列更可行的变换，在推理时应用。

items.en: In this paper, we propose Drifting Models, a new paradigm for generative modeling. Drifting Models are characterized by learning a pushforward map that evolves during training time, thereby removing the need for an iterative inference procedure. The mapping ff is represented by a single-pass, non-iterative network. As the training process is inherently iterative in deep learning optimization, it can be naturally viewed as evolving the pushforward distribution, f#​ppriorf_{\#}p_{\text{prior}}, through the update of ff. See Fig. 1.
items.zh: 本文提出漂移模型，一种新的生成建模范式。漂移模型的特点是学习一个在训练过程中演化的推前映射，从而消除了迭代推理过程的需要。映射 f 由一个单次、非迭代的网络表示。由于深度学习优化中的训练过程本质上是迭代的，因此可以自然地看作是通过更新 f 来演化推前分布 f_# p_prior。见图 1。

items.en: To drive the evolution of the training-time pushforward, we introduce a drifting field that governs the sample movement. This field depends on the generated distribution and the data distribution. By definition, this field becomes zero when the two distributions match, thereby reaching an equilibrium in which the samples no longer drift.
items.zh: 为了驱动训练时推前的演化，我们引入一个漂移场来指导样本移动。该场依赖于生成分布和数据分布。根据定义，当两个分布匹配时，该场变为零，从而样本不再漂移，达到平衡。

items.en: Building on this formulation, we propose a simple training objective that minimizes the drift of the generated samples. This objective induces sample movements and thereby evolves the underlying pushforward distribution through iterative optimization (e.g., SGD). We further introduce the designs of the drifting field, the neural network model, and the training algorithm.
items.zh: 基于这一公式，我们提出了一个简单的训练目标，最小化生成样本的漂移。该目标通过迭代优化（如 SGD）诱导样本移动，从而演化底层的推前分布。我们进一步介绍了漂移场、神经网络模型和训练算法的设计。

items.en: Drifting Models naturally perform single-step (“1-NFE”) generation and achieve strong empirical performance. On ImageNet 256×\times256, we obtain a 1-NFE FID of 1.54 under the standard latent-space generation protocol, achieving a new state-of-the-art among single-step methods. This result remains competitive even when compared with multi-step diffusion-/flow-based models. Further, under the more challenging pixel-space generation protocol (i.e., without latents), we reach a 1-NFE FID of 1.61, substantially outperforming previous pixel-space methods. These results suggest that Drifting Models offer a promising new paradigm for high-quality, efficient generative modeling.
items.zh: 漂移模型自然地执行单步（“1-NFE”）生成，并取得了强大的实证性能。在 ImageNet 256×256 上，我们在标准潜空间生成协议下获得了 1-NFE FID 为 1.54，在单步方法中达到了新的最先进水平。即使与多步扩散/流模型相比，这一结果也很有竞争力。此外，在更具挑战性的像素空间生成协议下（即无潜变量），我们达到了 1-NFE FID 为 1.61，大幅优于之前的像素空间方法。这些结果表明，漂移模型为高质量、高效的生成建模提供了一种有前景的新范式。

items.en: Diffusion models (e.g., Sohl-Dickstein et al. 2015; Ho et al. 2020; Song et al. 2020) and their flow-based counterparts (e.g., Lipman et al. 2022; Liu et al. 2022; Albergo et al. 2023) formulate noise-to-data mappings through differential equations (SDEs or ODEs). At the core of their inference-time computation is an iterative update, e.g., of the form 𝐱i+1=𝐱i+Δ​𝐱i\mathbf{x}_{i+1}=\mathbf{x}_{i}+\Delta\mathbf{x}_{i}, such as with an Euler solver. The update Δ​𝐱i\Delta\mathbf{x}_{i} depends on the neural network ff, and as a result, generation involves multiple steps of network evaluations.
items.zh: 扩散模型（例如 Sohl-Dickstein 等，2015；Ho 等，2020；Song 等，2020）及其基于流的对应模型（例如 Lipman 等，2022；Liu 等，2022；Albergo 等，2023）通过微分方程（SDE 或 ODE）构建噪声到数据的映射。其推理时计算的核心是迭代更新，例如形式为 x_{i+1} = x_i + Δx_i，如使用欧拉求解器。更新 Δx_i 依赖于神经网络 f，因此生成涉及多步网络评估。

items.en: A growing body of work has focused on reducing the steps of diffusion-/flow-based models. Distillation-based methods (e.g., Salimans and Ho 2022; Luo et al. 2023; Yin et al. 2024; Zhou et al. 2024) distill a pretrained multi-step model into a single-step one. Another line of research aims to train one-step diffusion/flow models from scratch (e.g., Song et al. 2023; Frans et al. 2024; Boffi et al. 2025; Geng et al. 2025a). To achieve this goal, these methods incorporate the SDE/ODE dynamics into training by approximating the induced trajectories. In contrast, our work presents a conceptually different paradigm and does not rely on SDE/ODE formulations as in diffusion/flow models.
items.zh: 越来越多的研究致力于减少扩散/流模型的步数。基于蒸馏的方法（例如 Salimans 和 Ho，2022；Luo 等，2023；Yin 等，2024；Zhou 等，2024）将预训练的多步模型蒸馏为单步模型。另一条研究路线旨在从头训练单步扩散/流模型（例如 Song 等，2023；Frans 等，2024；Boffi 等，2025；Geng 等，2025a）。为实现这一目标，这些方法通过近似诱导轨迹将 SDE/ODE 动力学纳入训练。相比之下，我们的工作提出了一种概念上不同的范式，不依赖于扩散/流模型中的 SDE/ODE 公式。

items.en: GANs (Goodfellow et al., 2014) are a classical family of models that train a generator by discriminating generated samples from real data. Like GANs, our method involves a single-pass network ff that maps noise to data, whose “goodness” is evaluated by a loss function; however, unlike GANs, our method does not rely on adversarial optimization.
items.zh: GAN（Goodfellow 等，2014）是一类经典模型，通过区分生成样本与真实数据来训练生成器。与 GAN 类似，我们的方法涉及一个单次网络 f，将噪声映射到数据，其“好坏”由损失函数评估；然而，与 GAN 不同，我们的方法不依赖于对抗优化。

items.en: VAEs (Kingma and Welling, 2013) optimize the evidence lower bound (ELBO), which consists of a reconstruction loss and a KL divergence term. Classical VAEs are one-step generators when using a Gaussian prior. Today’s prevailing VAE applications often resort to priors learned from other methods, e.g., diffusion (Rombach et al., 2022) or autoregressive models (Esser et al., 2021), where VAEs effectively act as tokenizers.
items.zh: VAE（Kingma 和 Welling，2013）优化证据下界（ELBO），包括重构损失和 KL 散度项。经典 VAE 在使用高斯先验时是单步生成器。如今主流的 VAE 应用通常借助其他方法学习的先验，例如扩散（Rombach 等，2022）或自回归模型（Esser 等，2021），其中 VAE 实际上充当分词器。

items.en: NFs (Rezende and Mohamed, 2015; Dinh et al., 2016; Zhai et al., 2024) learn mappings from data to noise and optimize the log-likelihood of samples. These methods require invertible architectures and computable Jacobians. Conceptually, NFs operate as one-step generators at inference, with computation performed by the inverse of the network.
items.zh: NF（Rezende 和 Mohamed，2015；Dinh 等，2016；Zhai 等，2024）学习从数据到噪声的映射，并优化样本的对数似然。这些方法要求可逆架构和可计算的雅可比矩阵。从概念上讲，NF 在推理时作为单步生成器运行，计算由网络的逆完成。

items.en: Moment-matching methods (Dziugaite et al., 2015; Li et al., 2015) seek to minimize the Maximum Mean Discrepancy (MMD) between the generated and data distributions. Moment Matching has recently been extended to one-/few-step diffusion (Zhou et al., 2025). Related to MMD, our approach also leverages the concepts of kernel functions and positive/negative samples. However, our approach focuses on a drifting field that explicitly governs the sample drifts at training time. Further discussion is in C.2.
items.zh: 矩匹配方法（Dziugaite 等，2015；Li 等，2015）旨在最小化生成分布与数据分布之间的最大均值差异（MMD）。矩匹配最近已扩展到单步/少步扩散（Zhou 等，2025）。与 MMD 相关，我们的方法也利用了核函数和正/负样本的概念。然而，我们的方法侧重于一个漂移场，该场在训练时显式指导样本漂移。进一步讨论见 C.2。

items.en: Our drifting field is driven by positive samples from the data distribution and negative samples from the generated distribution. This is conceptually related to the positive and negative samples in contrastive representation learning (Hadsell et al., 2006; Oord et al., 2018). The idea of contrastive learning has also been extended to generative models, e.g., to GANs (Unterthiner et al., 2017; Kang and Park, 2020) or Flow Matching (Stoica et al., 2025).
items.zh: 我们的漂移场由来自数据分布的正样本和来自生成分布的负样本驱动。这在概念上与对比表示学习中的正负样本相关（Hadsell 等，2006；Oord 等，2018）。对比学习的思想也已扩展到生成模型，例如 GAN（Unterthiner 等，2017；Kang 和 Park，2020）或流匹配（Stoica 等，2025）。

items.en: We propose Drifting Models, which formulate generative modeling as a training-time evolution of the pushforward distribution via a drifting field. Our model naturally performs one-step generation at inference time.
items.zh: 我们提出漂移模型，将生成建模表述为通过漂移场在训练时演化推前分布。我们的模型在推理时自然地执行单步生成。

items.en: Consider a neural network f:ℝC↦ℝDf:\mathbb{R}^{C}\mapsto\mathbb{R}^{D}. The input of ff is ϵ∼pϵ{\boldsymbol{\epsilon}}\sim p_{{\boldsymbol{\epsilon}}} (e.g., any noise of dimension CC), and the output is denoted by 𝐱=f​(ϵ)∈ℝD\mathbf{x}=f({\boldsymbol{\epsilon}})\in\mathbb{R}^{D}. In general, the input and output dimensions need not be equal.
items.zh: 考虑一个神经网络 f: ℝ^C ↦ ℝ^D。f 的输入是 ϵ ~ p_ϵ（例如维度为 C 的任何噪声），输出记为 x = f(ϵ) ∈ ℝ^D。通常，输入和输出维度不必相等。

items.en: We denote the distribution of the network output by qq, i.e., 𝐱=f​(ϵ)∼q\mathbf{x}=f({\boldsymbol{\epsilon}})\sim q. In probability theory, qq is referred to as the pushforward distribution of pϵp_{\boldsymbol{\epsilon}} under ff, denoted by:
items.zh: 我们将网络输出的分布记为 q，即 x = f(ϵ) ~ q。在概率论中，q 被称为 p_ϵ 在 f 下的推前分布，记为：

items.en: Here, “f#f_{\#}” denotes the pushforward induced by ff. Intuitively, this notation means that ff transforms a distribution pϵp_{{\boldsymbol{\epsilon}}} into another distribution qq. The goal of generative modeling is to find ff such that f#​pϵ≈pdataf_{\#}p_{{\boldsymbol{\epsilon}}}\approx p_{\text{data}}.
items.zh: 这里，“f_#”表示由 f 诱导的推前。直观上，这个符号意味着 f 将分布 p_ϵ 变换为另一个分布 q。生成建模的目标是找到 f，使得 f_# p_ϵ ≈ p_data。

items.en: Since neural network training is inherently iterative (e.g., SGD), the training process produces a sequence of models {fi}\{f_{i}\}, where ii denotes the training iteration. This corresponds to a sequence of pushforward distributions {qi}\{q_{i}\} during training, where qi=[fi]#​pϵq_{i}=[f_{i}]_{\#}p_{{\boldsymbol{\epsilon}}} for each ii. The training process progressively evolves qiq_{i} to match pdatap_{\text{data}}.
items.zh: 由于神经网络训练本质上是迭代的（例如 SGD），训练过程产生一系列模型 {f_i}，其中 i 表示训练迭代。这对应于训练过程中的一系列推前分布 {q_i}，其中对于每个 i，q_i = [f_i]_# p_ϵ。训练过程逐步演化 q_i 以匹配 p_data。

items.en: When the network ff is updated, a sample at training iteration ii is implicitly “drifted” as: 𝐱i+1=𝐱i+Δ​𝐱i\mathbf{x}_{i+1}=\mathbf{x}_{i}+\Delta\mathbf{x}_{i}, where Δ​𝐱i:=fi+1​(ϵ)−fi​(ϵ)\Delta\mathbf{x}_{i}:=f_{i+1}({\boldsymbol{\epsilon}})-f_{i}({\boldsymbol{\epsilon}}) arises from parameter updates to ff. This implies that the update of ff determines the “residual” of 𝐱\mathbf{x}, which we refer to as the “drift”.
items.zh: 当网络 ff 更新时，训练迭代 ii 中的样本会隐式地“漂移”为：𝐱i+1=𝐱i+Δ​𝐱i\mathbf{x}_{i+1}=\mathbf{x}_{i}+\Delta\mathbf{x}_{i}，其中 Δ​𝐱i:=fi+1​(ϵ)−fi​(ϵ)\Delta\mathbf{x}_{i}:=f_{i+1}({\boldsymbol{\epsilon}})-f_{i}({\boldsymbol{\epsilon}}) 源于 ff 的参数更新。这意味着 ff 的更新决定了 𝐱\mathbf{x} 的“残差”，我们称之为“漂移”。

items.en: Next, we define a drifting field to govern the training-time evolution of the samples 𝐱\mathbf{x} and, consequently, the pushforward distribution qq. A drifting field is a function that computes Δ​𝐱\Delta\mathbf{x} given 𝐱\mathbf{x}. Formally, denoting this field by 𝐕p,q​(⋅):ℝd→ℝd\mathbf{V}_{p,q}(\cdot)\colon\mathbb{R}^{d}\to\mathbb{R}^{d}, we have:
items.zh: 接下来，我们定义一个漂移场来指导样本 𝐱\mathbf{x} 在训练期间的演化，从而指导前推分布 qq。漂移场是一个根据 𝐱\mathbf{x} 计算 Δ​𝐱\Delta\mathbf{x} 的函数。形式上，将该场记为 𝐕p,q​(⋅):ℝd→ℝd\mathbf{V}_{p,q}(\cdot)\colon\mathbb{R}^{d}\to\mathbb{R}^{d}，我们有：

items.en: Here, 𝐱i=fi​(ϵ)∼qi\mathbf{x}_{i}=f_{i}({\boldsymbol{\epsilon}})\sim q_{i} and after drifting we denote 𝐱i+1∼qi+1\mathbf{x}_{i+1}\sim q_{i+1}. The subscripts p,qp,q denote that this field depends on pp (e.g., p=pdatap=p_{\text{data}}) and the current distribution qq.
items.zh: 这里，𝐱i=fi​(ϵ)∼qi\mathbf{x}_{i}=f_{i}({\boldsymbol{\epsilon}})\sim q_{i}，漂移后记为 𝐱i+1∼qi+1\mathbf{x}_{i+1}\sim q_{i+1}。下标 p,qp,q 表示该场依赖于 pp（例如 p=pdatap=p_{\text{data}}）和当前分布 qq。

items.en: Ideally, when p=qp=q, we want all 𝐱\mathbf{x} to stop drifting i.e., 𝐕=0\mathbf{V}=\textbf{0}. In this paper, we consider the following proposition:
items.zh: 理想情况下，当 p=qp=q 时，我们希望所有 𝐱\mathbf{x} 停止漂移，即 𝐕=0\mathbf{V}=\textbf{0}。在本文中，我们考虑以下命题：

items.en: Consider an anti-symmetric drifting field:
items.zh: 考虑一个反对称漂移场：

items.en: Then we have: q=p⇒𝐕p,q​(𝐱)=𝟎,∀𝐱\quad q=p\quad\Rightarrow\quad\mathbf{V}_{p,q}(\mathbf{x})=\mathbf{0},\forall\mathbf{x}.
items.zh: 那么我们有：q=p⇒𝐕p,q​(𝐱)=𝟎,∀𝐱\quad q=p\quad\Rightarrow\quad\mathbf{V}_{p,q}(\mathbf{x})=\mathbf{0},\forall\mathbf{x}。

items.en: The proof is straightforward111q=p⇒𝐕p,q=𝐕q,p=−𝐕p,q⇒𝐕p,q=0q{=}p\Rightarrow\mathbf{V}_{p,q}{=}\mathbf{V}_{q,p}{=}{-}\mathbf{V}_{p,q}\Rightarrow\mathbf{V}_{p,q}{=}\textbf{0}. Intuitively, anti-symmetry means that swapping pp and qq simply flips the sign of the drift. This proposition implies that if the pushforward distribution qq matches the data distribution pp, the drift is zero for any sample and the model achieves an equilibrium.
items.zh: 证明是直接的 111q=p⇒𝐕p,q=𝐕q,p=−𝐕p,q⇒𝐕p,q=0q{=}p\Rightarrow\mathbf{V}_{p,q}{=}\mathbf{V}_{q,p}{=}{-}\mathbf{V}_{p,q}\Rightarrow\mathbf{V}_{p,q}{=}\textbf{0}。直观上，反对称意味着交换 pp 和 qq 只会改变漂移的符号。该命题表明，如果前推分布 qq 与数据分布 pp 匹配，则任何样本的漂移为零，模型达到平衡。

items.en: We note that the converse implication, i.e., 𝐕p,q=𝟎⇒q=p\mathbf{V}_{p,q}=\mathbf{0}\Rightarrow q=p, is false in general for arbitrary choices of 𝐕\mathbf{V}. For our kernelized formulation (Sec. 3.3), we give sufficient conditions under which 𝐕p,q≈𝟎\mathbf{V}_{p,q}\approx\mathbf{0} implies q≈pq\approx p (Appendix C.1).
items.zh: 我们注意到，逆命题，即 𝐕p,q=𝟎⇒q=p\mathbf{V}_{p,q}=\mathbf{0}\Rightarrow q=p，对于任意选择的 𝐕\mathbf{V} 通常不成立。对于我们的核化公式（第 3.3 节），我们给出了 𝐕p,q≈𝟎\mathbf{V}_{p,q}\approx\mathbf{0} 蕴含 q≈pq\approx p 的充分条件（附录 C.1）。

items.en: The property of equilibrium motivates a definition of a training objective. Let fθf_{\theta} be a network parameterized by θ\theta, and 𝐱=fθ​(ϵ)\mathbf{x}=f_{\theta}({\boldsymbol{\epsilon}}) for ϵ∼pϵ{\boldsymbol{\epsilon}}\sim p_{\boldsymbol{\epsilon}}. At the equilibrium where 𝐕=0\mathbf{V}=\textbf{0}, we set up the following fixed-point relation:
items.zh: 平衡性质启发我们定义训练目标。设 fθf_{\theta} 是由 θ\theta 参数化的网络，且 𝐱=fθ​(ϵ)\mathbf{x}=f_{\theta}({\boldsymbol{\epsilon}})，其中 ϵ∼pϵ{\boldsymbol{\epsilon}}\sim p_{\boldsymbol{\epsilon}}。在 𝐕=0\mathbf{V}=\textbf{0} 的平衡点，我们建立以下不动点关系：

items.en: Here, θ^{\hat{\theta}} denotes the optimal parameters that can achieve the equilibrium, and qθ^q_{\hat{\theta}} denotes the pushforward of fθ^f_{{\hat{\theta}}}.
items.zh: 这里，θ^{\hat{\theta}} 表示能达到平衡的最优参数，qθ^q_{\hat{\theta}} 表示 fθ^f_{{\hat{\theta}}} 的前推分布。

items.en: This equation motivates a fixed-point iteration during training. At iteration ii, we seek to satisfy:
items.zh: 该方程在训练中启发了一种不动点迭代。在迭代 ii 时，我们试图满足：

items.en: We convert this update rule into a loss function:
items.zh: 我们将此更新规则转化为损失函数：

items.en: Here, the stop-gradient operation provides a frozen state from the last iteration, following (Chen and He, 2021; Song and Dhariwal, 2023). Intuitively, we compute a frozen target and move the network prediction toward it.
items.zh: 这里，stop-gradient 操作提供了来自上一次迭代的冻结状态，遵循 (Chen and He, 2021; Song and Dhariwal, 2023)。直观上，我们计算一个冻结目标，并将网络预测向它移动。

items.en: We note that the value of our loss function ℒ\mathcal{L} is equal to 𝔼ϵ​[‖𝐕​(f​(ϵ))‖2]\mathbb{E}_{{\boldsymbol{\epsilon}}}\big[\|\mathbf{V}(f({\boldsymbol{\epsilon}}))\|^{2}\big], that is, the squared norm of the drifting field 𝐕\mathbf{V}. With the stop-gradient formulation, our solver does not directly back-propagate through 𝐕\mathbf{V}, because 𝐕\mathbf{V} depends on qθq_{\theta} and back-propagating through a distribution is nontrivial. Instead, our formulation minimizes this objective indirectly: it moves 𝐱=fθ​(ϵ)\mathbf{x}=f_{\theta}({\boldsymbol{\epsilon}}) towards its drifted version, i.e., towards 𝐱+Δ​𝐱\mathbf{x}+\Delta\mathbf{x} that is frozen at this iteration.
items.zh: 我们注意到损失函数 ℒ\mathcal{L} 的值等于 𝔼ϵ​[‖𝐕​(f​(ϵ))‖2]\mathbb{E}_{{\boldsymbol{\epsilon}}}\big[\|\mathbf{V}(f({\boldsymbol{\epsilon}}))\|^{2}\big]，即漂移场 𝐕\mathbf{V} 的平方范数。通过 stop-gradient 公式，我们的求解器不直接通过 𝐕\mathbf{V} 反向传播，因为 𝐕\mathbf{V} 依赖于 qθq_{\theta}，而通过分布反向传播是困难的。相反，我们的公式间接最小化该目标：它将 𝐱=fθ​(ϵ)\mathbf{x}=f_{\theta}({\boldsymbol{\epsilon}}) 移向其漂移版本，即移向本次迭代中冻结的 𝐱+Δ​𝐱\mathbf{x}+\Delta\mathbf{x}。

items.en: The field 𝐕p,q\mathbf{V}_{p,q} depends on two distributions pp and qq. To obtain a computable formulation, we consider the form:
items.zh: 场 𝐕p,q\mathbf{V}_{p,q} 依赖于两个分布 pp 和 qq。为了得到可计算的公式，我们考虑以下形式：

items.en: where 𝒦​(⋅,⋅,⋅)\mathcal{K}(\cdot,\cdot,\cdot) is a kernel-like function describing interactions among three sample points. 𝒦\mathcal{K} can optionally depend on pp and qq. Our framework supports a broad class of functions 𝒦\mathcal{K}, as long as 𝐕=0\mathbf{V}=\text{0} when p=qp=q.
items.zh: 其中 𝒦​(⋅,⋅,⋅)\mathcal{K}(\cdot,\cdot,\cdot) 是一个类似核的函数，描述三个样本点之间的相互作用。𝒦\mathcal{K} 可以选择性地依赖于 pp 和 qq。我们的框架支持一大类函数 𝒦\mathcal{K}，只要当 p=qp=q 时 𝐕=0\mathbf{V}=\text{0}。

items.en: For the instantiation in this work, we introduce a form of 𝐕\mathbf{V} driven by attraction and repulsion. We define the following fields inspired by the mean-shift method (Cheng, 1995):
items.zh: 对于本文中的实例化，我们引入了一种由吸引和排斥驱动的 𝐕\mathbf{V} 形式。我们定义以下受均值漂移方法 (Cheng, 1995) 启发的场：

items.en: Here, ZpZ_{p} and ZqZ_{q} are normalization factors:
items.zh: 这里，ZpZ_{p} 和 ZqZ_{q} 是归一化因子：

items.en: Intuitively, Eq. (8) computes the weighted mean of the vector difference 𝐲−𝐱\mathbf{y}-\mathbf{x}. The weights are given by a kernel k​(⋅,⋅)k(\cdot,\cdot) normalized by (9). We then define 𝐕\mathbf{V} as:
items.zh: 直观上，式 (8) 计算向量差 𝐲−𝐱\mathbf{y}-\mathbf{x} 的加权均值。权重由核 k​(⋅,⋅)k(\cdot,\cdot) 经 (9) 归一化给出。然后我们将 𝐕\mathbf{V} 定义为：

items.en: Intuitively, this field can be viewed as attracting by the data distribution pp and repulsing by the sample distribution qq. This is illustrated in Fig. 2.
items.zh: 直观上，该场可以看作被数据分布 pp 吸引，被样本分布 qq 排斥。如图 2 所示。

items.en: Substituting Eq. (8) into Eq. (10), we obtain:
items.zh: 将式(8)代入式（10），我们得到：

items.en: Here, the vector difference reduces to 𝐲+−𝐲−\mathbf{y}^{+}-\mathbf{y}^{-}; the weight is computed from two kernels and normalized jointly. This form is an instantiation of Eq. (7). It is easy to see that 𝐕\mathbf{V} is anti-symmetric: 𝐕p,q=−𝐕q,p\mathbf{V}_{p,q}=-\mathbf{V}_{q,p}. In general, our method does not require 𝐕\mathbf{V} to be decomposed into attraction and repulsion; it only requires 𝐕=0\mathbf{V}=\text{0} when p=qp=q.
items.zh: 这里，向量差简化为𝐲+−𝐲−；权重由两个核计算并联合归一化。该形式是式(7)的一个实例。容易看出𝐕是反对称的：𝐕p,q=−𝐕q,p。通常，我们的方法不要求将𝐕分解为吸引和排斥；仅要求当 p=q 时𝐕=0。

items.capEn: Figure 2: Illustration of drifting a sample. A generated sample 𝐱\mathbf{x} (black) drifts according to a vector: 𝐕=𝐕p+−𝐕q−\mathbf{V}=\mathbf{V}^{+}_{p}-\mathbf{V}^{-}_{q}. Here, 𝐕p+\mathbf{V}^{+}_{p} is the mean-shift vector of the positive samples (blue) and 𝐕q−\mathbf{V}^{-}_{q} is the mean-shift vector of the negative samples (orange): see Eq. (8). 𝐱\mathbf{x} is attracted by 𝐕p+\mathbf{V}^{+}_{p} and repulsed by 𝐕q−\mathbf{V}^{-}_{q}.
items.capZh: 图 2：样本漂移示意图。生成的样本𝐱（黑色）根据向量𝐕=𝐕p+−𝐕q−漂移。这里，𝐕p+是正样本（蓝色）的均值漂移向量，𝐕q−是负样本（橙色）的均值漂移向量：见式(8)。𝐱被𝐕p+吸引并被𝐕q−排斥。

items.en: The kernel k​(⋅,⋅)k(\cdot,\cdot) can be a function that measures the similarity. In this paper, we adopt:
items.zh: 核 k(⋅,⋅)可以是衡量相似度的函数。本文中，我们采用：

items.en: where τ\tau is a temperature and ∥⋅∥\|\cdot\| is ℓ2\ell_{2}-distance. We view k~​(𝐱,𝐲)≜1Z​k​(𝐱,𝐲)\tilde{k}(\mathbf{x},\mathbf{y})\triangleq\frac{1}{Z}k(\mathbf{x},\mathbf{y}) as a normalized kernel, which absorbs the normalization in Eq. (11).
items.zh: 其中τ是温度，∥⋅∥是ℓ2 距离。我们将 k~(𝐱,𝐲)≜1Zk(𝐱,𝐲)视为归一化核，它吸收了式（11）中的归一化。

items.en: In practice, we implement k~\tilde{k} using a softmax operation, with logits given by −1τ​‖𝐱−𝐲‖-\frac{1}{\tau}\|\mathbf{x}-\mathbf{y}\|, where the softmax is taken over 𝐲\mathbf{y}. This softmax operation is similar to that of InfoNCE (Oord et al., 2018) in contrastive learning. In our implementation, we further apply an extra softmax normalization over the set of {𝐱}\{\mathbf{x}\} within a batch, which slightly improves performance in practice. This additional normalization does not alter the antisymmetric property of the resulting 𝐕\mathbf{V}.
items.zh: 实践中，我们使用 softmax 操作实现 k~，其 logits 由−1τ‖𝐱−𝐲‖给出，其中 softmax 对𝐲进行。该 softmax 操作类似于对比学习中的 InfoNCE（Oord 等人，2018）。在我们的实现中，我们进一步对批次内的{𝐱}集合应用额外的 softmax 归一化，这在实际中略微提升了性能。该额外归一化不会改变所得𝐕的反对称性质。

items.en: Since our training loss in Eq. (6) encourages minimizing ‖𝐕‖2\|\mathbf{V}\|^{2}, we hope that 𝐕≈0\mathbf{V}\approx\textbf{0} leads to q≈pq\approx p. While this implication does not hold for arbitrary choices of 𝐕\mathbf{V}, we empirically observe that decreasing the value of ‖𝐕‖2\|\mathbf{V}\|^{2} correlates with improved generation quality. In Appendix C.1, we provide an identifiability heuristic: for our kernelized construction, the zero-drift condition imposes a large set of bilinear constraints on (p,q)(p,q), and under mild non-degeneracy assumptions this forces pp and qq to match (approximately).
items.zh: 由于我们的训练损失式(6)鼓励最小化‖𝐕‖2，我们希望𝐕≈0 导致 q≈p。虽然这一蕴含关系对任意选择的𝐕并不成立，但我们经验观察到，减小‖𝐕‖2 的值与生成质量的提升相关。在附录 C.1 中，我们提供了一个可辨识性启发：对于我们的核化构造，零漂移条件对（p,q）施加了一组双线性约束，在温和的非退化假设下，这迫使 p 和 q（近似）匹配。

items.en: In stochastic training (e.g., mini-batch optimization), we estimate 𝐕\mathbf{V} by approximating the expectations in Eq. (11) with empirical means. For each training step, we draw NN samples of noise ϵ∼pϵ{\boldsymbol{\epsilon}}\sim p_{\boldsymbol{\epsilon}} and compute a batch of 𝐱=fθ​(ϵ)∼q\mathbf{x}=f_{\theta}({\boldsymbol{\epsilon}})\sim q. The generated samples also serve as the negative samples in the same batch, i.e., 𝐲−∼q\mathbf{y}^{-}\sim q. On the other hand, we sample NposN_{\text{pos}} data points 𝐲+∼pdata\mathbf{y}^{+}\sim p_{\text{data}}. The drifting field 𝐕\mathbf{V} is computed in this batch of positive and negative samples. Alg. 1 provide the pseudocode for such a training step, where compute_V is given in Section A.1.
items.zh: 在随机训练（例如小批量优化）中，我们通过用经验均值近似式（11）中的期望来估计𝐕。对于每个训练步，我们抽取 N 个噪声样本ϵ∼pϵ，并计算一批𝐱=fθ(ϵ)∼q。生成的样本也作为同一批次中的负样本，即𝐲−∼q。另一方面，我们采样 Npos 个数据点𝐲+∼pdata。漂移场𝐕在该批正负样本中计算。算法 1 提供了此类训练步的伪代码，其中 compute_V 见 A.1 节。

items.en: Thus far, we have defined the objective (6) directly in the raw data space. Our formulation can be extended to any feature space. Let ϕ\phi denote a feature extractor (e.g., an image encoder) operating on real or generated samples. We rewrite the loss (6) in the feature space as:
items.zh: 到目前为止，我们直接在原始数据空间中定义了目标(6)。我们的公式可以扩展到任何特征空间。令ϕ表示作用于真实或生成样本的特征提取器（例如图像编码器）。我们将损失(6)重写为特征空间中的形式：

items.en: Here, 𝐱=fθ​(ϵ)\mathbf{x}=f_{\theta}({\boldsymbol{\epsilon}}) is the output (e.g., images) of the generator. 𝐕\mathbf{V} is defined in the feature space: in practice, this means that ϕ​(𝐲+)\phi(\mathbf{y}^{+}) and ϕ​(𝐲−)\phi(\mathbf{y}^{-}) serve as the positive/negative samples. It is worth noting that feature encoding is a training-time operation and is not used at inference time.
items.zh: 这里，𝐱=fθ(ϵ)是生成器的输出（例如图像）。𝐕在特征空间中定义：实践中，这意味着ϕ(𝐲+)和ϕ(𝐲−)作为正/负样本。值得注意的是，特征编码是训练时的操作，在推理时不使用。

items.en: This can be further extended to multiple features, e.g., at multiple scales and locations:
items.zh: 这可以进一步扩展到多个特征，例如在多个尺度和位置上：

items.en: Here, ϕj\phi_{j} represents the feature vectors at the jj-th scale and/or location from an encoder ϕ\phi. With a ResNet-style image encoder (He et al., 2016), we compute drifting losses across multiple scales and locations, which provides richer gradient information for training.
items.zh: 这里，ϕj 表示来自编码器ϕ的第 j 个尺度和/或位置的特征向量。使用 ResNet 风格的图像编码器（He 等人，2016），我们在多个尺度和位置上计算漂移损失，这为训练提供了更丰富的梯度信息。

items.en: The feature extractor plays an important role in the generation of high-dimensional data. As our method is based on the kernel k​(⋅,⋅)k(\cdot,\cdot) for characterizing sample similarities, it is desired for semantically similar samples to stay close in the feature space. This goal is aligned with self-supervised learning (e.g., He et al. 2020; Chen et al. 2020a). We use pre-trained self-supervised models as the feature extractor.
items.zh: 特征提取器在高维数据生成中扮演重要角色。由于我们的方法基于核 k(⋅,⋅)来表征样本相似性，因此希望语义相似的样本在特征空间中保持接近。这一目标与自监督学习（例如 He 等人 2020；Chen 等人 2020a）一致。我们使用预训练的自监督模型作为特征提取器。

items.en: Our feature-space loss is related to perceptual loss (Zhang et al., 2018) but is conceptually different. The perceptual loss minimizes: ‖ϕ​(𝐱)−ϕ​(𝐱target)‖22\|\phi(\mathbf{x})-\phi(\mathbf{x}_{\text{target}})\|_{2}^{2}, that is, the regression target is ϕ​(𝐱target)\phi(\mathbf{x}_{\text{target}}) and requires pairing 𝐱\mathbf{x} with its target. In contrast, our regression target in (13) is ϕ​(𝐱)+𝐕​(ϕ​(𝐱))\phi(\mathbf{x})+\mathbf{V}\big(\phi(\mathbf{x})\big), where the drifting is in the feature space and requires no pairing. In principle, our feature-space loss aims to match the pushforward distributions ϕ#​q\phi_{\#}q and ϕ#​p\phi_{\#}p.
items.zh: 我们的特征空间损失与感知损失（Zhang 等人，2018）相关，但概念上不同。感知损失最小化：‖ϕ(𝐱)−ϕ(𝐱target)‖22，即回归目标是ϕ(𝐱target)，并要求𝐱与其目标配对。相比之下，我们在（13）中的回归目标是ϕ(𝐱)+𝐕(ϕ(𝐱))，其中漂移在特征空间中进行，且不需要配对。原则上，我们的特征空间损失旨在匹配推前分布ϕ#q 和ϕ#p。

items.en: Our feature-space loss is orthogonal to the concept of generators in the latent space (e.g., Latent Diffusion (Rombach et al., 2022)). In our case, when using ϕ\phi, the generator ff can still produce outputs in the pixel space or the latent space of a tokenizer. If the generator ff is in the latent space and the feature extractor ϕ\phi is in the pixel space, the tokenizer decoder is applied before extracting features from ϕ\phi.
items.zh: 我们的特征空间损失与潜在空间中的生成器概念（例如潜在扩散（Rombach 等人，2022））是正交的。在我们的情况下，当使用ϕ时，生成器 f 仍然可以在像素空间或分词器的潜在空间中产生输出。如果生成器 f 在潜在空间而特征提取器ϕ在像素空间，则在从ϕ提取特征之前应用分词器解码器。

items.en: Classifier-free guidance (CFG) (Ho and Salimans, 2022) improves generation quality by extrapolating between class-conditional and unconditional distributions. Our method naturally supports a related form of guidance.
items.zh: 无分类器指导（CFG）（Ho 和 Salimans，2022）通过在类条件分布和无条件分布之间外推来提升生成质量。我们的方法自然支持一种相关的指导形式。

items.en: In our model, given a class label cc as the condition, the underlying target distribution pp now becomes pdata(⋅|c)p_{\text{data}}(\cdot|c), from which we can draw positive samples: 𝐲+∼pdata(⋅|c)\mathbf{y}^{+}\sim p_{\text{data}}(\cdot|c). To achieve guidance, we draw negative samples either from generated samples or real samples from different classes. Formally, the negative sample distribution is now:
items.zh: 在我们的模型中，给定类标签 c 作为条件，底层目标分布 p 变为 pdata(⋅|c)，我们可以从中抽取正样本：𝐲+∼pdata(⋅|c)。为了实现指导，我们从生成的样本或来自不同类别的真实样本中抽取负样本。形式上，负样本分布现在为：

items.en: Here, γ∈[0,1)\gamma\in[0,1) is a mixing rate, and pdata(⋅|∅)p_{\text{data}}(\cdot|\varnothing) denotes the unconditional data distribution222This should be the data distribution excluding the class cc. For simplicity, we use the unconditional data distribution..
items.zh: 这里，γ∈[0,1)是混合率，pdata(⋅|∅)表示无条件数据分布 222 这应该是排除类别 c 的数据分布。为简单起见，我们使用无条件数据分布。。

items.en: The goal of learning is to find q~(⋅|c)=pdata(⋅|c)\tilde{q}(\cdot|c)=p_{\text{data}}(\cdot|c). Substituting it into (15), we obtain:
items.zh: 学习的目标是找到 q~(⋅|c)=pdata(⋅|c)。将其代入（15），我们得到：

items.en: where α=11−γ≥1\alpha=\frac{1}{1-\gamma}\geq 1. This implies that qθ(⋅|c)q_{\theta}(\cdot|c) is to approximate a linear combination of conditional and unconditional data distributions. This follows the spirit of original CFG.
items.zh: 其中α=11−γ≥1。这意味着 qθ(⋅|c)要近似条件和无条件数据分布的线性组合。这遵循了原始 CFG 的精神。

items.en: In practice, Eq. (15) means that we sample extra negative examples from the data in pdata(⋅|∅)p_{\text{data}}(\cdot|\varnothing), in addition to the generated data. The distribution qθ(⋅|c)q_{\theta}(\cdot|c) corresponds to a class-conditional network fθ(⋅|c)f_{\theta}(\cdot|c), similar to common practice (Ho and Salimans, 2022). We note that, in our method, CFG is a training-time behavior by design: the one-step (1-NFE) property is preserved at inference time.
items.zh: 在实践中，式（15）意味着我们从数据分布 pdata(·|∅) 中额外采样负例，除了生成的数据。分布 qθ(·|c) 对应于一个类别条件网络 fθ(·|c)，类似于常见做法（Ho 和 Salimans, 2022）。我们注意到，在我们的方法中，CFG 是一种设计上的训练时行为：推理时保留了单步（1-NFE）性质。

items.en: We describe our implementation for image generation on ImageNet (Deng et al., 2009) at resolution 256×\times256. Full implementation details are provided in Appendix A.
items.zh: 我们描述了在 ImageNet（Deng 等人，2009）上以 256×256 分辨率进行图像生成的实现。完整的实现细节见附录 A。

items.en: By default, we perform generation in latent space (Rombach et al., 2022). We adopt the standard SD-VAE tokenizer, which produces a 32×\times32×\times4 latent space in which generation is performed.
items.zh: 默认情况下，我们在潜在空间中进行生成（Rombach 等人，2022）。我们采用标准的 SD-VAE 分词器，它产生一个 32×32×4 的潜在空间，生成在其中进行。

items.en: Our generator (fθf_{\theta}) has a DiT-like (Peebles and Xie, 2023) architecture. Its input is 32×\times32×\times4-dim Gaussian noise ϵ{\boldsymbol{\epsilon}}, and its output is the generated latent 𝐱\mathbf{x} of the same dimension. We use a patch size of 2, i.e., like DiT/2. Our model uses adaLN-zero (Peebles and Xie, 2023) for processing class-conditioning or other extra conditioning.
items.zh: 我们的生成器（fθ）具有类似 DiT（Peebles 和 Xie, 2023）的架构。其输入是 32×32×4 维的高斯噪声 ε，输出是相同维度的生成潜在变量 x。我们使用 patch size 为 2，即类似 DiT/2。我们的模型使用 adaLN-zero（Peebles 和 Xie, 2023）来处理类别条件或其他额外条件。

items.en: We follow (Geng et al., 2025b) and adopt CFG-conditioning. At training time, a CFG scale α\alpha (Eq. (16)) is randomly sampled. Negative samples are prepared based on α\alpha (Eq. (15)), and the network is conditioned on this value. At inference time, α\alpha can be freely specified and varied without retraining. Details are in A.7.
items.zh: 我们遵循（Geng 等人，2025b）并采用 CFG 条件化。在训练时，随机采样一个 CFG 尺度 α（式（16））。根据 α（式（15））准备负样本，网络以此值为条件。在推理时，α 可以自由指定和变化，无需重新训练。细节见 A.7。

items.en: The pseudo-code in Alg. 1 describes a batch of N=NnegN=N_{\text{neg}} generated samples. In practice, when class labels are involved, we sample a batch of NcN_{\text{c}} class labels. For each label, we perform Alg. 1 independently. Accordingly, the effective batch size is B=Nc×NB=N_{\text{c}}{\times}N, which consists of Nc×NN_{\text{c}}{\times}N negatives and Nc×NposN_{\text{c}}{\times}N_{\text{pos}} positives.
items.zh: 算法 1 中的伪代码描述了一批 N=Nneg 个生成样本。在实践中，当涉及类别标签时，我们采样一批 Nc 个类别标签。对于每个标签，我们独立执行算法 1。因此，有效批量大小为 B=Nc×N，由 Nc×N 个负样本和 Nc×Npos 个正样本组成。

items.en: We define a “training epoch” based on the number of generated samples 𝐱\mathbf{x}. In particular, each iteration generates BB samples, and one epoch corresponds to Ndata/BN_{\text{data}}/B iterations for a dataset of size NdataN_{\text{data}}.
items.zh: 我们基于生成样本 x 的数量定义“训练周期”。具体来说，每次迭代生成 B 个样本，一个周期对应于 Ndata/B 次迭代，其中 Ndata 是数据集大小。

items.en: Our model is trained with drifting loss in a feature space (Sec. 3.4). The feature extractor ϕ\phi is an image encoder. We mainly consider a ResNet-style (He et al., 2016) encoder, pre-trained by self-supervised learning, e.g., MoCo (He et al., 2020) and SimCLR (Chen et al., 2020a). When these pre-trained models operate in pixel space, we apply the VAE decoder to map our generator’s latent-space output back to pixel space for feature extraction. Gradients are backpropagated through the feature encoder and VAE decoder. We also study an MAE (He et al., 2022) pre-trained in latent space (detailed in A.3).
items.zh: 我们的模型在特征空间中使用漂移损失进行训练（第 3.4 节）。特征提取器 φ 是一个图像编码器。我们主要考虑一个 ResNet 风格（He 等人，2016）的编码器，通过自监督学习预训练，例如 MoCo（He 等人，2020）和 SimCLR（Chen 等人，2020a）。当这些预训练模型在像素空间操作时，我们应用 VAE 解码器将生成器的潜在空间输出映射回像素空间以进行特征提取。梯度通过特征编码器和 VAE 解码器反向传播。我们还研究了一个在潜在空间预训练的 MAE（He 等人，2022）（详见 A.3）。

items.en: For all ResNet-style models, features are extracted from multiple stages (i.e., multi-scale feature maps). The drifting loss in (13) is computed at each scale and then combined. We elaborate on the details in A.6.
items.zh: 对于所有 ResNet 风格模型，特征从多个阶段（即多尺度特征图）提取。式（13）中的漂移损失在每个尺度上计算然后合并。我们在 A.6 中详细说明。

items.en: While our experiments primarily focus on latent-space generation, our models support pixel-space generation. In this case, ϵ{\boldsymbol{\epsilon}} and 𝐱\mathbf{x} are both 256×\times256×\times3. We use a patch size of 16 (i.e., DiT/16). The feature extractor ϕ\phi is directly on the pixel space.
items.zh: 虽然我们的实验主要关注潜在空间生成，但我们的模型支持像素空间生成。在这种情况下，ε 和 x 都是 256×256×3。我们使用 patch size 为 16（即 DiT/16）。特征提取器 φ 直接在像素空间上。

items.capEn: Figure 3: Evolution of the generated distribution. The distribution qq (orange) evolves toward a bimodal target pp (blue) during training. We show three initializations of qq: (top): initialized between the two modes; (middle): initialized far from both modes; (bottom): initialized collapsed onto one mode. Across all initializations, our method approximates the target distribution without mode collapse.
items.capZh: 图 3：生成分布的演化。在训练过程中，分布 q（橙色）向双峰目标 p（蓝色）演化。我们展示了 q 的三种初始化：（上）初始化在两个模式之间；（中）初始化远离两个模式；（下）初始化坍缩到一个模式上。在所有初始化中，我们的方法都近似了目标分布，没有模式坍缩。

items.en: In this toy example, our method approximates the target distribution without exhibiting mode collapse. This holds even when qq is initialized in a collapsed single-mode state (bottom). This provides intuition into why our method is robust to mode collapse: if qq collapses onto one mode, other modes of pp will attract the samples, allowing them to continue moving and pushing qq to continue evolving.
items.zh: 在这个玩具示例中，我们的方法近似了目标分布，没有出现模式坍缩。即使 q 初始化为坍缩的单模状态（下），也是如此。这提供了我们的方法对模式坍缩鲁棒性的直觉：如果 q 坍缩到一个模式，p 的其他模式将吸引样本，使它们继续移动并推动 q 继续演化。

items.capEn: Figure 4: Evolution of samples. We show generated points sampled at different training iterations, along with their loss values. The loss (whose value equals ‖V‖2\|V\|^{2}) decreases as the distribution converges to the target. (y-axis is log-scale.)
items.capZh: 图 4：样本的演化。我们展示了在不同训练迭代中采样的生成点，以及它们的损失值。损失（其值等于 ||V||²）随着分布收敛到目标而减小。（y 轴为对数尺度。）

items.en: We evaluate our models on ImageNet 256×\times256. Ablation studies use a B/2 model on the SD-VAE latent space, trained for 100 epochs. The drifting loss is in a feature space computed by a latent-MAE encoder. We report FID (Heusel et al., 2017) on 50K generated images. We analyze the results as follows.
items.zh: 我们在 ImageNet 256×256 上评估我们的模型。消融研究使用 SD-VAE 潜在空间上的 B/2 模型，训练 100 个周期。漂移损失在由潜在 MAE 编码器计算的特征空间中。我们报告 50K 生成图像上的 FID（Heusel 等人，2017）。我们分析结果如下。

items.en: Our derivation of equilibrium requires the drifting field to be anti-symmetric; see Eq. (3). In Table 1, we conduct a destructive study that intentionally breaks this anti-symmetry. The anti-symmetric case (our ablation default) works well, while other cases fail catastrophically.
items.zh: 我们平衡态的推导要求漂移场是反对称的；见式(3)。在表 1 中，我们进行了一项破坏性研究，故意打破这种反对称性。反对称情况（我们的消融默认）效果良好，而其他情况则灾难性地失败。

items.en: Intuitively, for a sample 𝐱\mathbf{x}, we want attraction from pp to be canceled by repulsion from qq when pp and qq match. This equilibrium is not achieved in the destructive cases.
items.zh: 直观上，对于样本 x，我们希望当 p 和 q 匹配时，来自 p 的吸引力被来自 q 的排斥力抵消。这种平衡在破坏性情况下无法实现。

items.en: Our method samples positive and negative examples to estimate 𝐕\mathbf{V} (see Alg. 1). In Table 2, we study the effect of NposN_{\text{pos}} and NnegN_{\text{neg}}, under fixed epochs and fixed batch size BB.
items.zh: 我们的方法采样正例和负例来估计 V（见算法 1）。在表 2 中，我们研究了在固定周期和固定批量大小 B 下，Npos 和 Nneg 的影响。

items.en: Our model computes the drifting loss in a feature space (Sec. 3.4). Table 3 compares the feature encoders. Using the public pre-trained encoders from SimCLR (Chen et al., 2020a) and MoCo v2 (Chen et al., 2020b), our method obtains decent results.
items.zh: 我们的模型在特征空间中计算漂移损失（第 3.4 节）。表 3 比较了特征编码器。使用来自 SimCLR（Chen 等人，2020a）和 MoCo v2（Chen 等人，2020b）的公开预训练编码器，我们的方法获得了不错的结果。

items.en: These standard encoders operate in the pixel domain, which requires running the VAE decoder at training. To circumvent this, we pre-train a ResNet-style model with the MAE objective (He et al., 2022), directly on the latent space. The feature space produced by this “latent-MAE” performs strongly (Table 3). Increasing the MAE encoder width and the number of pre-training epochs both improve generation quality; fine-tuning it with a classifier (‘cls ft’) boosts the results further to 3.36 FID.
items.zh: 这些标准编码器在像素域操作，这需要在训练时运行 VAE 解码器。为了规避这一点，我们使用 MAE 目标（He 等人，2022）直接在潜在空间上预训练一个 ResNet 风格模型。这个“潜在 MAE”产生的特征空间表现强劲（表 3）。增加 MAE 编码器宽度和预训练周期数都能提高生成质量；使用分类器微调（'cls ft'）进一步将结果提升到 3.36 FID。

items.en: The comparison in Table 3 shows that the quality of the feature encoder plays an important role. We hypothesize that this is because our method depends on a kernel k​(⋅,⋅)k(\cdot,\cdot) (see Eq. (12)) to measure sample similarity. Samples that are closer in feature space generally yield stronger drift, providing richer training signals. This goal is aligned with the motivation of self-supervised learning. A strong feature encoder reduces the occurrence of a nearly “flat” kernel (i.e., k​(⋅,⋅)k(\cdot,\cdot) vanishes because all samples are far away).
items.zh: 表 3 中的比较表明，特征编码器的质量起着重要作用。我们假设这是因为我们的方法依赖于核 k(·,·)（见式（12））来衡量样本相似性。在特征空间中更接近的样本通常产生更强的漂移，提供更丰富的训练信号。这一目标与自监督学习的动机一致。一个强大的特征编码器减少了近乎“平坦”核（即 k(·,·) 由于所有样本相距甚远而消失）的出现。

items.en: On the other hand, we report that we were unable to make our method work on ImageNet without a feature encoder. In this case, the kernel may fail to effectively describe similarity, even in the presence of a latent VAE. We leave further study of this limitation for future work.
items.zh: 另一方面，我们报告称，在没有特征编码器的情况下，我们的方法无法在 ImageNet 上生效。在这种情况下，即使存在潜在 VAE，核函数也可能无法有效描述相似性。我们将这一局限性的进一步研究留待未来工作。

items.en: In addition to the ablation setting, we train stronger variants and summarize them in Table 4. We compare with previous methods in Table 5.
items.zh: 除了消融设置外，我们还训练了更强的变体，并在表 4 中进行了总结。我们在表 5 中与先前方法进行了比较。

items.en: Our method achieves 1.54 FID with native 1-NFE generation. It outperforms all previous 1-NFE methods, which are based on approximating diffusion-/flow-based trajectories. Notably, our Base-size model competes with previous XL-size models. Our best model (FID 1.54) uses a CFG scale of 1.0, which corresponds to “no CFG” in diffusion-based methods. Our CFG formulation exhibits a tradeoff between FID and IS (see B.3), similar to standard CFG.
items.zh: 我们的方法在原生 1-NFE 生成中实现了 1.54 的 FID。它优于所有先前基于近似扩散/流轨迹的 1-NFE 方法。值得注意的是，我们的 Base-size 模型与先前的 XL-size 模型相竞争。我们的最佳模型（FID 1.54）使用 CFG 尺度为 1.0，这对应于扩散方法中的“无 CFG”。我们的 CFG 公式在 FID 和 IS 之间表现出权衡（见 B.3），类似于标准 CFG。

items.en: We provide uncurated qualitative results in Appendix B.5, Fig. 7-10, with CFG 1.0. Moreover, Fig. 11-15 show a side-by-side comparison with improved MeanFlow (iMF) (Geng et al., 2025b), a recent state-of-the-art one-step method.
items.zh: 我们在附录 B.5、图 7-10 中提供了 CFG 为 1.0 时的未精选定性结果。此外，图 11-15 展示了与改进的 MeanFlow（iMF）（Geng 等人，2025b）——一种最新的最先进一步方法——的并排比较。

items.en: Our method can naturally work without the latent VAE, i.e., the generator ff directly produces 256×\times256×\times3 images. The feature encoder is applied on the generated images for computing drifting loss. We adopt a configuration similar to that of the latent variant; implementation details are in Appendix A.
items.zh: 我们的方法可以自然地无需潜在 VAE 工作，即生成器 ff 直接产生 256×256×3 的图像。特征编码器应用于生成的图像以计算漂移损失。我们采用了与潜在变体类似的配置；实现细节见附录 A。

items.en: Beyond image generation, we further evaluate our method on robotics control. Our experiment designs and protocols follow Diffusion Policy (Chi et al., 2023). At the core of Diffusion Policy is a multi-step, diffusion-based generator; we replace it with our one-step Drifting Model. We directly compute drifting loss on the raw representations for control, using no feature space. Results are in Table 7. Our 1-NFE model matches or exceeds the state-of-the-art Diffusion Policy that uses 100 NFE. This comparison suggests that Drifting Models can serve as a promising generative model across different domains.
items.zh: 除了图像生成，我们进一步在机器人控制上评估了我们的方法。我们的实验设计和协议遵循 Diffusion Policy（Chi 等人，2023）。Diffusion Policy 的核心是一个多步、基于扩散的生成器；我们将其替换为我们的单步漂移模型。我们直接在原始控制表示上计算漂移损失，不使用特征空间。结果见表 7。我们的 1-NFE 模型匹配或超过了使用 100 NFE 的最先进 Diffusion Policy。这一比较表明，漂移模型可以作为跨不同领域的有前景的生成模型。

items.en: We present Drifting Models, a new paradigm for generative modeling. At the core of our model is the idea of modeling the evolution of pushforward distributions during training. This allows us to focus on the update rule, i.e., 𝐱i+1=𝐱i+Δ​𝐱i\mathbf{x}_{i+1}=\mathbf{x}_{i}+\Delta\mathbf{x}_{i}, during the iterative training process. This is in contrast with diffusion-/flow-based models, which perform the iterative update at inference time. Our method naturally performs one-step inference.
items.zh: 我们提出了漂移模型，一种新的生成建模范式。我们模型的核心思想是在训练过程中对前推分布的演化进行建模。这使我们能够专注于迭代训练过程中的更新规则，即 x_{i+1}=x_i+Δx_i。这与扩散/流模型形成对比，后者在推理时执行迭代更新。我们的方法自然地进行一步推理。

items.en: Given that our methodology is substantially different, many open questions remain. For example, although we show that q=p⇒𝐕=𝟎q=p\Rightarrow\mathbf{V}=\mathbf{0}, the converse implication does not generally hold in theory. While our designed 𝐕\mathbf{V} performs well empirically, it remains unclear under what conditions 𝐕→𝟎\mathbf{V}\rightarrow\mathbf{0} leads to q→pq\rightarrow p.
items.zh: 鉴于我们的方法在本质上不同，许多开放问题仍然存在。例如，尽管我们证明了 q=p⇒V=0，但逆蕴含在理论上通常不成立。虽然我们设计的 V 在经验上表现良好，但尚不清楚在什么条件下 V→0 会导致 q→p。

items.en: From a practical standpoint, although our paper presents an effective instantiation of drifting modeling, many of our design decisions may remain sub-optimal. For example, the design of the drifting field and its kernels, the feature encoder, and the generator architecture remain open for future exploration.
items.zh: 从实践角度来看，尽管我们的论文提出了漂移建模的有效实例，但我们的许多设计决策可能仍然不是最优的。例如，漂移场及其核函数、特征编码器和生成器架构的设计仍有待未来探索。

items.en: From a broader perspective, our work reframes iterative neural network training as a mechanism for distribution evolution, in contrast to the differential equations underlying diffusion-/flow-based models. We hope that this perspective will inspire the exploration of other realizations of this mechanism in future work.
items.zh: 从更广泛的角度来看，我们的工作将迭代神经网络训练重新定义为分布演化的机制，这与扩散/流模型背后的微分方程形成对比。我们希望这一视角能激发未来工作中对该机制其他实现的探索。
